summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ Platform Settings Page. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 7 settings tabs working correctly with proper form fields and save functionality.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor issue, charts still render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Settings Page fully functional. All 7 tabs (Account, General, Brand, Terms, Privacy, Contact, Security) working correctly. Backend APIs at /api/settings/* all operational.

admin_login.evidence: Admin login with admin@nassaq.com / Admin@123 successful, redirects to /admin dashboard

settings_page_navigation.evidence: Settings page at /settings loads correctly with all 7 tabs visible

account_settings_tab.evidence: Shows profile picture, name, email, phone, language fields with change password option

general_settings_tab.evidence: Shows platform name (AR/EN), browser title, default language, date system, timezone, notification toggles (email/SMS/push), AI features toggle, registration open toggle, maintenance mode toggle, system info (version 2.1.0, Production, MongoDB)

terms_conditions_tab.evidence: Shows current version (2.1), last updated date, version history button, publish new version button, content editor with terms text

privacy_policy_tab.evidence: Shows current version (2.0), last updated date, version history button, publish new version button, content editor with privacy policy text

contact_info_tab.evidence: Shows primary email, support email, primary phone, alternate phone, address, working hours, owner name, social media URLs (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube)

security_tab.evidence: Shows active sessions list (3 sessions with device/IP/location), end other sessions button, 2FA toggle, session duration (60 min), max sessions (3), password policy (min length 8, uppercase, numbers, special chars required)

save_functionality.evidence: Save button on General Settings works correctly, shows success toast 'تم الحفظ بنجاح'
